name: ZW Data Action Technologies Inc.
summary: ZW Data Action Technologies Inc. is a Nevada holding company operating through VIEs in China. It provides data-driven precision marketing services, internet advertising, and data analytics solutions to SMEs in China. Services include online advertising via its ChinaNet platform, big data analytics, blockchain-based marketing tools, and rural internet services. It operates through subsidiaries including Business Opportunity Online and Beijing CNET Online Advertising Co., Ltd.

products.name: ChinaNet Platform
products.description: Online advertising and marketing platform targeting SMEs in China with precision marketing capabilities.

products.name: Big Data Analytics Services
products.description: Data analytics solutions providing targeted advertising and marketing insights to business clients.

products.name: Blockchain-Based Marketing Tools
products.description: Blockchain-enabled marketing tools designed to enhance transparency and efficiency in digital advertising.

products.name: Rural Internet Services
products.description: Internet and digital marketing services targeting rural markets in China.
